title: Medical Documentation and Secretariat Mission and Vision
content:
Medical Documentation and Secretariat Mission and Vision

Mission

The mission of the Medical Documentation and Secretariat Program is to bring medical secretaries and healthcare professionals to the health sector, trained in the field of documentation and secretariat in order to manage and compile the information and documents to master medical terminology to obtain medical services by providing written and verbal communication to save time and labor in respect to ethical rules.

Vision

The vision of the Medical Documentation and Secretariat program, in which medical secretaries are trained to be the professionals who can take part in providing the best standards of document and information services, which are an integral part of healthcare services by following all innovations and developments in the field of medical documentation by improving the quality of education through enhancing the quality of the medical secretariat field to reach the best level that can be achieved.
